steps.title: Find the key context clue
steps.content: The strongest signal is the explanation that follows: “new batteries can't be put in once the old ones no longer work.” This directly reveals what the blank should mean—that old batteries cannot be substituted with fresh ones.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the correct choice
steps.content:
The target meaning is the act of substituting old batteries with new ones. replaced directly expresses this idea—it means to substitute something old with something new.

The other three choices (rated, invented, prevented) do not address battery exchange.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
